title: Korean HD Font
description: Uses an HD font instead of a pixel font
body:
[Click to read in Korean](https://github.com/justUser6666/K-Font/blob/main/README-ko.md)

# About
![enable resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f8b5b2be7b6e1d0de95db5066d232ef55f4780.png)
- Uses an HD font in Minecraft.
- Support Korean.
- Support italic.
- Support Bold.
- Used Pretendard Font.
- Preninedard font is included to implement italics. Its name has been changed in accordance with the license.
- The default is bold weight, and bold text is displayed in black weight.

# Require
- **This resource pack requires the [Caxton mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton).**
- This mod is required to support bold fonts and glowing signs.

# Warning
- **If you are using [BBE](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities) or [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) Mod, please remove them**.
- If you use the mod, it can cause glowing text to render incorrectly.
- Reliable fix has not yet been found.
- If you want to use it with the mod, try toggling the text culling and texture filtering options and reload resourcepack several times.
